title: agrostis botelhoi
side_effects: Agrostis botelhoi can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, including skin irritation, hives, and respiratory issues in sensitive individuals. Overconsumption of the plant's extracts may also lead to gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, diarrhea, and stomach cramps. In rare cases, improper use of Agrostis botelhoi may cause interactions with certain medications, resulting in adverse effects like increased heart rate, blood pressure, and anxiety. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any part of the Agrostis botelhoi plant for medicinal purposes.
